name: Haori of the Wind
description: Notes Using your ability will change your skin to the Wind Flower skin for 30 seconds, which will reset to the actual skin you have equipped after 30 seconds (with a 30 second cooldown after), or every time you change zones.
effects: Halloween Costume: On ability use, dress up as Wind Flower Ninja for 60 seconds! Secret Power: On ability use, consume 1/4th of your candy-filled meter to activate a secret power! Bladed Blossom: Create a sakura summon that rapidly attacks for 60-70 armor piercing damage. Secret Power Cooldown: 180 seconds
